metadata.title: Korporex — Online Business Incorporation in Canada
metadata.description: Incorporate your Canadian business online in about 10 minutes. Federal and Ontario filings handled end-to-end and delivered within 24 hours.

common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us at {email}.

footer.tagline: Canada's online business incorporation platform. Fast, affordable, fully online.
footer.responseLine: We respond to all enquiries within one business day.
footer.copyrightDisclaimer: © {year} Korporex Business Solutions Inc. All rights reserved. Korporex is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice.

soon.metaDescription: Korporex — Canadian business incorporation and corporate services — is launching soon. In the meantime, get in touch and we'll respond within 24 hours.
soon.lead1: Korporex is a new Canadian business incorporation and corporate-services platform — built to make federal and provincial filings fast, transparent, and fully online. Our full site goes live soon.
soon.lead2: In the meantime, if you need {incorporation}, a {registration}, an {amendment}, or a {compliance}, get in touch — we're already taking orders.

form.headline: Tell Us About Your Business
form.lead: Leave your details and we'll respond within {hours} hours.
form.name: Full Name
form.consent: By submitting, you agree we may contact you about your enquiry.
form.thankYouHeadline: Thank you — we've received your message.
form.thankYouBody: A member of our team will respond within {hours} at the email you provided. In the meantime, you can also reach us directly at {email}.

soon.footerCopyright: © {year} Korporex Business Solutions Inc. All rights reserved.
soon.footerDisclaimer: Korporex is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice.

heroContactForm.title: Have a Question?
heroContactForm.subtitle: We respond within one business day.
heroContactForm.name: Full Name
heroContactForm.thankYouBody: We've received your message and will get back to you within one business day.

hero.lead: Incorporate your business in Canada in as little as 24 hours. 100% online, government-compliant filings, and transparent pricing — available to Canadian entrepreneurs and international founders.

jurisdictions.title: Choose Your Jurisdiction
jurisdictions.lead: Federal and Ontario — each is a valid choice depending on where you plan to operate, the name-protection scope you need, and your budget. Neither is superior; the right pick depends on your business. {faqLink}

federal.title: Federal
federal.subtitle: Canada Business Corporations Act
federal.description: Incorporate federally under the CBCA. Country-wide name protection and operate in any province (with extra-provincial registration).

ontario.title: Ontario
ontario.subtitle: Ontario Business Corporations Act
ontario.description: Incorporate provincially in Ontario. Automatic authorization to carry on business throughout the province.

otherServices.title: Complete Corporate Services
otherServices.lead: Beyond incorporation, Korporex handles the ongoing filings your business needs to grow, change, and stay compliant — all online, all at a fixed price.

registrations.title: Registrations
registrations.description: Sole proprietorships, business names, and extra-provincial registrations.

amendments.title: Changes & Amendments
amendments.description: Update directors, officers, shareholders, addresses, or articles.

compliance.title: Compliance Filings
compliance.description: Annual returns and statutory filings to keep your corporation in good standing.

businessUpdates.title: Business Updates
businessUpdates.description: Dissolve, revive, amalgamate, or continue your corporation across jurisdictions.

1.title: Choose Your Service
1.description: Select the jurisdiction and incorporation type that fits your business. Not sure? Our FAQ covers the key differences.

2.title: Complete the Online Form
2.description: Answer a few questions about your business, directors, and shareholders. Takes about 10 minutes, entirely online.

3.title: We File Within 24 Hours
3.description: Your application is submitted to the government and your incorporation documents are delivered by email.

speed.title: 24-Hour Turnaround
speed.description: Most orders are processed and submitted to the government within 24 hours of completion.

online.title: 100% Online
online.description: No office visits. No paper forms. Complete your entire incorporation from your phone or laptop.

compliant.title: Government-Compliant
compliant.description: Every filing follows current federal and provincial corporate-registry requirements.

transparent.title: Transparent Pricing
transparent.description: Government filing fees included in our prices. Taxes and NUANS name-search fees are not included and shown separately at checkout.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Thousands of Canadian Entrepreneurs

items.quote: Incorporated my business in less than a day. The process was completely straightforward and the team was incredibly responsive.
items.name: Michael R.

items.quote: I was dreading the incorporation process but Korporex made it completely painless. Highly recommended for any Canadian entrepreneur.
items.name: Jennifer L.

items.quote: Used Korporex for our federal incorporation and annual filings. Fast, reliable, and exceptional value for money.
items.name: David K.

ctaBottom.title: Start Your Incorporation Today
ctaBottom.lead: Join thousands of Canadian entrepreneurs who've simplified their business registration with Korporex. Get incorporated in as little as 24 hours.
